message:
Wire useUpdateProgress WebSocket hook into UpdateSettings

Replace polling-based progress tracking with real-time WebSocket
broadcasts from kc-agent. The Update Now button now shows step-by-step
progress (pulling, building frontend, building Go, restarting) via
the existing useUpdateProgress hook. Add dismiss buttons to
success/failure banners.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
